free_text: Analogue resonances in V-49 and V-51.
The targets of isotopically pure Ti-48 and Ti-50 were
used.
REACTION code in Sub 004,005 was changed,
COMMON in Sub 004,005 was added.
Six surface barrier detectors were used.
0.5 to 5 mu-g/cm2 thick layers of 48Ti on 20 mu-g/cm2
thick carbon backings were used as targets.
Data are given in counts per 200 mu-Coulomb
Data are given in counts per 120 mu-Coulomb

Data digitizing error

Data are given in counts per 100 mu-Coulomb

thick carbon backings were used as targets.

For a detailed study of the gamma ray decay a
50 cm3 Ge(Li) detector has been used.
The thick targets of about 50 mu-g/cm2 on tantalum
backing were used.
